trans-unit.source: A module to add a blog on your web store.
trans-unit.target: Enhance your online store with the best Addons blog.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete this module ?
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to delete this module ?
The XML file has been successfully imported

trans-unit.source: If you select a slider from Creative slider, please switch off the Prestablog's slideshow on the right side.
trans-unit.target: If you select a slider from Creative slider, please switch off the Prestablog's slideshow on the right side.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while delete news.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while deleting news.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while delete categorie.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while deleting categorie.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while delete antispam question.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while deleting antispam question.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while change status of news.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while changing status of news.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while change status of slide.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while changing status of slide.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while change status of antispam question.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while changing status of antispam question.

trans-unit.source: Sorry, your file must be png/jpg/jpeg/gif.
trans-unit.target: Sorry, your file must be png/jpg/jpeg/gif.

trans-unit.source: Sorry, your file was not uploaded. Your image needs to be less than
trans-unit.target: Sorry, your file was not uploaded. Your image needs to be less than

trans-unit.source: You must activate at least one language
trans-unit.target: You must activate at least one language

trans-unit.source: You must choose at least one categorie
trans-unit.target: You must choose at least one categorie

trans-unit.source: The url rewrite must be specified
trans-unit.target: The url rewrite must be provided

trans-unit.source: The content or introduction must be specified
trans-unit.target: The content or introduction must be provided

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while add object.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while adding object.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while upload image.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while uploading image.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while update object.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while updating object.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while change status of custom articles list.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while changing status of custom article list.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while change random status of custom articles list.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while changing random status of custom article list.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while delete object.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while deleting object.

trans-unit.source: The field %1$s is not a correct.
The file is too large. Maximum size allowed is: %1$d kB. The file you're trying to upload is: %2$d kB.
trans-unit.target: The file is too large. Maximum size allowed is: %1$d kB. The file you're trying to upload is: %2$d kB.

trans-unit.source: No existing the module's default "en" mails folder.
trans-unit.target: The module default "en" folder for the module does not exist.

trans-unit.source: Error extract the module's default "en" mails folder.
trans-unit.target: Error extract the module's default "en" mails folder.

trans-unit.source: Restore the module's default "en" mails folder successfull.
trans-unit.target: Restore of the module's default "en" mails folder successfull.

trans-unit.source: No existing the sitemap folder for %1$s
trans-unit.target: The sitemap folder for %1$s does not exist

trans-unit.source: Error creating the sitemap folder for %1$s.
trans-unit.target: Error creating the sitemap folder for %1$s.

trans-unit.source: The folder %1$s not have the write permissions.
trans-unit.target: The folder %1$s not have the writing permissions.

trans-unit.source: You cannot reply to a comment that does not exist or is not approved.
trans-unit.target: You cannot reply to a comment that does not exist or is not approved.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while saving the reply.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while saving the reply.

trans-unit.source: You do not have permission to access this page.
trans-unit.target: You do not have permission to access this page.

trans-unit.source: The actual configuration of your sizes are settle to :
Add your articles on home's frontpage
trans-unit.target: Add your articles on home's frontpage

trans-unit.source: The slide will be displayed in the center column of the home page of your shop.
trans-unit.target: The slide will be displayed on the center column of your shop's home page..

trans-unit.source: The slide will be displayed in the top of first page articles list of blog.
trans-unit.target: The slide will be displayed at the top of the first page of your blog.

trans-unit.source: If enabled, the title of the slide will be displayed on the front.
trans-unit.target: If enabled, the title of the slide will be displayed on the front.

trans-unit.source: The classic comment system (on the left of your page) and its options cannot be applied to facebook comments (on the right of your page).
trans-unit.target: The classic comment system (on the left of your page) and its options cannot be applied to facebook comments (on the right of your page).

trans-unit.source: This feature will redirect %1$s to this url with a redirect 301
trans-unit.target: This feature will redirect %1$s to this url with a redirect 301

trans-unit.source: Your antispam reply is not correct.
trans-unit.target: Your antispam reply is not correct.

trans-unit.source: Your name cannot be empty or inferior at 3 characters.
trans-unit.target: Your name cannot be empty or fewer than 3 characters.

trans-unit.source: Your comment cannot be empty or inferior at 5 characters.
trans-unit.target: Your comment cannot be empty or fewer than 5 characters.

trans-unit.source: Make sure to validate the captcha.
Delete all sitemap xml for this shop
trans-unit.target: Delete all sitemap xml for this blog

trans-unit.source: Use master sitemap to regroup all news :
trans-unit.target: Use master sitemap to regroup all news :

trans-unit.source: All sitemaps can be crawled individually for %1$s store :
trans-unit.target: All sitemaps can be crawled individually for %1$s store :

trans-unit.source: Sitemap allow webmaster to inform crawlers search engine.
trans-unit.target: Sitemap allows webmasters to inform search engine crawlers.

trans-unit.source: Limit url number per xml file
trans-unit.target: Limit the number of URLs per XML file.

trans-unit.source: Add a "Cron task" to reload this url:
trans-unit.target: Add a "Cron task" to reload this url:

trans-unit.source: It will automatically generate your XML Sitemaps.
trans-unit.target: It will automatically generate your XML Sitemaps.

trans-unit.source: This action will erase all current sitemaps for the shop %1$s
trans-unit.target: This action will erase all sitemaps from the blog %1$s

trans-unit.source: Only registered users can publish a comment
trans-unit.target: Only registered users can publish a comment

trans-unit.source: Inform admin by email for a new comment
trans-unit.target: Inform admin by email for a new comment

trans-unit.source: You can manage comments directly on facebook application.
trans-unit.target: You can manage comments directly on facebook application.

trans-unit.source: Add a facebook accounts ID for beeing comments moderators.
trans-unit.target: Add a facebook account ID to become comment moderator.

trans-unit.source: You must choose at least one language !
trans-unit.target: You must choose at least one language !

trans-unit.source: Leave blank to use the default template %1$s
trans-unit.target: Leave blank to use the default template %1$s

trans-unit.source: This option will randomize your list.
trans-unit.target: This option will randomize your list.

trans-unit.source: Feature disabled on the demo mode
trans-unit.target: Feature disabled on the demo mode
Display the number of items in each category

trans-unit.source: Supports the count of items in the categories recursive children.
trans-unit.target: Supports the number of items in child categories recursively.

trans-unit.source: Top of first page of category
Full size picture width for category
trans-unit.target: Width of the large image of a category

trans-unit.target: Height of the large image of a category

trans-unit.source: Only if blog link is activated
trans-unit.target: Only if blog link is activated

trans-unit.source: In order to display the slides from Creative Slider anywhere you want in the article, please paste the shortcode of the slide you want from the Creative Slider module in your content.
trans-unit.target: In order to display the slides from Creative Slider anywhere you want in the article, please paste the shortcode of the slide you want from the Creative Slider module in your content.

trans-unit.source: Please select a picture to crop.
trans-unit.target: Please select a picture to crop.

trans-unit.source: Please select a crop region then press submit.
trans-unit.target: Please select a crop region then press submit.

trans-unit.source: Configure the max length in the general configuration of the module theme.
trans-unit.target: Set the summary size in Configuration > Category > Description Size.

trans-unit.source: Add a popup to your article :
trans-unit.target: Add a popup to your article :

trans-unit.source: The slide will be displayed in your blog's welcome page
trans-unit.target: The slide will be displayed in your blog's welcome page

trans-unit.source: In order to improve our translation system, or if you have any request
trans-unit.target: In order to improve our translation system, or if you have any request

trans-unit.target: Please feel free to contact us via the

trans-unit.source: The general rewrite option (Friendly URL) of your PrestaShop is not activate.
trans-unit.target: The general rewrite option (Friendly URL) of your PrestaShop is not activate.

trans-unit.source: You must enable this general option to it works.
trans-unit.target: You must enable this general option for this to work.

trans-unit.source: Enable only if your server allows URL rewriting (recommended)
trans-unit.target: Enable only if your server allows URL rewriting (recommended)

trans-unit.source: Show breadcrumb in all blog pages
trans-unit.target: Show the breadcrumb trail on the blog pages

trans-unit.source: Show thumbnail image in article page
trans-unit.target: Show thumbnail image in article page

trans-unit.source: Rss link for categories in the news page.
trans-unit.target: Rss link for categories in the news page.

trans-unit.source: Add a new tab with associated blog posts directly in your product page
trans-unit.target: Add a new tab with associated blog posts directly in your product page

trans-unit.target: Width of thumbnail in the product list linked

trans-unit.source: Number of characters to search on related products for article edited
trans-unit.target: Number of characters to search on related products for article edited

trans-unit.target: Number of results in search off related products for article edited

trans-unit.target: Number of characters to search on related articles for article edited

trans-unit.target: Number of results in search off related articles for article edited

trans-unit.source: Always show comments in article edition
trans-unit.target: Always show comments in article edition

trans-unit.source: Click here to open AI chat
trans-unit.target: Click here to open AI chat

trans-unit.source: Add this shortcode directly in your tpl
trans-unit.target: Add this shortcode directly in your tpl

trans-unit.source: Change the order of categories with a simple drag and drop.
trans-unit.target: Change the order of categories with a simple drag and drop.

trans-unit.target: This option may penalize your SEO.

trans-unit.source: Advance search in the top of results, with filter of categories
trans-unit.target: Advance search in the top of results, with filter of categories

trans-unit.source: Order of the blocks on columns
trans-unit.target: Order of the blocks on columns

trans-unit.source: Use this link in your menu configuration:
trans-unit.target: Use this link in your menu configuration:

trans-unit.source: Be careful, if you change the URL after being referenced, you'll lost all your work. Please use with caution
trans-unit.target: Be careful, if you change the URL after being referenced, you'll lost all your work. Please use with caution

trans-unit.source: The popup will be displayed in the blog's home page. For displaying the popup in articles or categories, please go directly to the creation of articles and categories
trans-unit.target: The popup will be displayed in the blog's home page. For displaying the popup in articles or categories, please go directly to the creation of articles and categories

trans-unit.source: If your multistore functionnality is on, please select one shop to configure your blog.
trans-unit.target: If your multistore functionnality is on, please select one shop to configure your blog.

trans-unit.source: Then the blue icon "?" related to the module
trans-unit.target: Then on the icon with 3 vertical dots and finally, documentation

trans-unit.source: You must add a new category before deleting this one !
trans-unit.target: You must add a new category before deleting this one !

trans-unit.source: For delete parent category, you should delete all child before !
trans-unit.target: To delete a parent category, you must first delete all its child categories.

trans-unit.source: You do not have permission to access this page
trans-unit.target: You do not have permission to access this page

trans-unit.source: To moderate comments, go on the front office at bottom of each posts.
trans-unit.target: To moderate comments, go to the front office and scroll to the bottom of each post.

trans-unit.source: This Antispam option can protect you to comments of spammers robots.
trans-unit.target: This Antispam option can protect you from spam.

trans-unit.source: Will random in the comment form.
trans-unit.target: Will be randomly displayed in the comment form

trans-unit.source: If the changes are not taken into account, please go to the management of your template to appearance > theme and logo > choose the layout. You should find the blog module at the bottom of the table and will be able to choose how to display the blog.
trans-unit.target: If the changes are not taken into account, please go to the management of your template to appearance > theme and logo > choose the layout. You should find the blog module at the bottom of the table and will be able to choose how to display the blog.

trans-unit.source: Activate the permission system for authors.
trans-unit.target: Activate the permission system for authors.

trans-unit.source: Only allow the author and super admin to edit their own news
trans-unit.target: Allow only the author and super admin to edit their own news

trans-unit.source: Activate the display of author and author's link page on the news.
trans-unit.target: Enable the display of the author's name and link to the author's page on the news

trans-unit.target: You are about to leave this page. Are you sure?

trans-unit.target: This position is already used for this language

trans-unit.target: Be careful! Select only the Articles for export from your WordPres.
